title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #1, Killer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Shaka as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The way I see it, when it comes to a government island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You gotta think about who's gonna be around to bail 'em out if they get caught.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yohoho! Was thinking the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Would you care for some tea?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on, just gimme a moment of your time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know our deal was to drop me off anywhere away from Wano, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't think we'd be headn' for a government island...

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: I heard you helped our captain out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: New steps are sprouting out of the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could say the whole island runs on fire.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, you can convert its power into any kind of energy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't that burn through a load of natural resources?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm always looking into alternative fuels.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If only there was such a thing as an eternal flame...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'd be able to make my very own sun...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the?! she's goin' right through the wall?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop Dilly- Dallying and walk through! You should never let your own senses dups you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way?! It's turned back into solid metal again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How the heck does that work?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Y'all can keep goin' dead ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Howdy. Now just keep walkin' like I said.

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 50 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
